root_cause: vLLM engine initialization failed because max_model_len=65536 exceeds the N150 device limit of 32768 for TT-Llama8B/11B models. The server never started, causing all subsequent tests to fail with connection refused errors.
error_message: ValueError: TT-LLama8B and TT-Llama11B do not support max_model_len greater than 32768 on N150 (received 65536). Set --max_model_len to 32768 or lower in vLLM.
suggested_action: Set --max_model_len to 32768 or lower when launching vLLM server for Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct on N150 device.
